    • getTempPath

      protected Path getTempPath()
      Create path to a temporary file to which the data is written. Only after completion is the file moved to #getPath()
      Returns:
      a path

      public boolean notifyObserver(String email, JobStatus status, URI downloadUri) throws UnsupportedEncodingException, jakarta.mail.MessagingException

      email -
      status - a JobStatus object.
      downloadUri - the URI under which the download is made available

      a boolean.

      jakarta.mail.MessagingException - if any.
